title: BEM-725 ask Claude reason
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/agreements/active','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff','governance/autonomy']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 13:02 (UTC+3)'
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem725_repeat_strategy_and_ask_claude_no_response_reason.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-725 | CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUIRED | WHY NO MAILBOX RESPONSE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Статус: URGENT_FINAL_DECISION_AND_DIAGNOSTIC_REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Claude, повторный запрос по BEM-703/BEM-712.'+sep+sep+'## Вопрос 1 — финальный вердикт'+sep+'Дай итоговый ответ по стратегии архитектуры мультиагентной системы v2.1:'+sep+'APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED.'+sep+sep+'## Вопрос 2 — почему не было ответа'+sep+'Объясни, почему после предыдущих файлов в `governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/` не появился ответ в `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/`.'+sep+sep+'Нужно указать точную причину:'+sep+'- не был запущен Claude runtime;'+sep+'- нет trigger на входящий mailbox;'+sep+'- workflow/secret/provider недоступен;'+sep+'- запрос был не в том mailbox;'+sep+'- иной blocker.'+sep+sep+'## Required response format'+sep+'```'+sep+'BEM-725 | CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+'Date: YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM (UTC+3)'+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Why no previous response: ...'+sep+'Runtime/trigger status: ...'+sep+'Blocking reason: null / ...'+sep+'Required fix: ...'+sep+'Final recommendation: ...'+sep+'```'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
active=Path('governance/agreements/active/bem703_multiagent_strategy_architecture_v21.json')
try:
    data=json.loads(active.read_text(errors='ignore')) if active.exists() else {}
except:
    data={}
data.update({'schema_version':'agreement_active.v3','agreement_id':'BEM-703','status':'bem725_repeat_sent_awaiting_claude_reason_and_decision','latest_mailbox_file':str(mail),'required_response':'APPROVED_CHANGE_REQUIRED_BLOCKED plus why no previous response','operator_role':'none','updated_at':created,'blocker':None})
active.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
watch=Path('governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json')
try:
    w=json.loads(watch.read_text(errors='ignore')) if watch.exists() else {}
except:
    w={}
w.update({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.v3','active':True,'run_id':'bem703_bem712_bem725_watchdog','interval_seconds':60,'until':'APPROVED_CHANGE_REQUIRED_BLOCKED','watch_scope':'BEM-703 BEM-712 BEM-725','kicked_at':created,'operator_role':'none'})
watch.write_text(json.dumps(w,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-725 WAIT CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude asked again. Required: final decision and explanation why no previous mailbox response. Minute watchdog active; operator is not relay.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'repeat_claude_and_ask_no_response_reason.v1','bem':'BEM-725','status':'sent_to_claude_and_watchdog_kicked','mailbox_file':str(mail),'active_file':str(active),'watchdog_active':str(watch),'operator_role':'none','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem725_repeat_claude_and_ask_no_response_reason.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem725_repeat_claude_and_ask_no_response_reason.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-725 | Repeat Claude And Ask No Response Reason | SENT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Sent repeat request to Claude with explicit diagnostic question: why no previous mailbox response.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem725_repeat_claude_and_ask_no_response_reason','status':'sent_to_claude_and_watchdog_kicked','mailbox_file':str(mail),'blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem725_repeat_claude_and_ask_no_response_reason.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-725 SENT: repeated Claude request and asked why no previous mailbox response.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(mail),str(active),str(watch),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Repeated Claude strategy request and explicitly asked Claude to explain why no previous mailbox response appeared; watchdog active flag kicked')
"""
No issue comments.
